name: chat-hive
description: A real-time chat application built with MERN stack and Socket.io
author: Owais Ahmad Shah

scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter backend build
scripts.build:frontend: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint
